stages.title: Brainstorm
stages.description: Front-door brainstorm that produces the gitignored brief (with the greppable uiFeature: marker) the pipeline consumes.

stages.title: Validate
stages.description: Validate the brainstorm brief (exists, parses, carries the uiFeature: marker) and project-bootstrap coherence; derive uiFeature. The engine never conducts the brainstorm.

stages.title: Epic Authoring
stages.description: The epic-authoring skill consumes the brief and produces the epic spec as a gitignored tmp/docs draft.

stages.title: Figma Design
stages.description: Conditional (UI features only): the figma-design skill builds the design frames for the feature.

stages.title: Figma Review
stages.description: Conditional (UI features only): review the Figma design; the Figma-Design-Verdict gates fan-out.

stages.title: Issue Fan-out
stages.description: The issue-authoring skill creates the child issues first, then the epic, on GitHub.

stages.title: Plan Review
stages.description: Plan-review loop (children first, epic last): the issue-plan-review skill gates each issue spec before implementation starts.

stages.title: Implement
stages.description: Per-child implementer agents implement each issue in its own worktree, parallel and dependency-ordered.

stages.title: PR Creation
stages.description: The creating-prs skill opens each pull request with the five-section, diagram-first body.

stages.title: PR Review
stages.description: PR-review loop: the reviewing skill drives a fresh-context anti-slop review (plus a design-reviewer pass on UI PRs).

stages.title: Merge
stages.description: The pr-workflow skill queues each approved PR through Mergify (@Mergifyio queue) and squash-merges; the epic closes last.

stages.title: Deploy Verify
stages.description: Verify the post-merge deploy CI job on the main push; reads gh state, dispatches no worker.
